title: stanhopea oculata var. guttulata
intro: Stanhopea oculata var. guttulata, also known as the eye-shaped stanhopea, is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Stanhopea oculata var. guttulata include its ability to relieve congestion, reduce coughing, and alleviate respiratory irritation. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal remedies, such as teas and infusions, which are often consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
